Home / Forms & Surveys / Formbricks

Formbricks — open source alternative

Open source Typeform alternative with in-app surveys.

Strengths

  • Modern React UI.
  • In-app surveys for product teams.
  • Quick docker deploy.

Weaknesses

  • Some analytics tied to paid tier.
  • Younger project with evolving features.
  • Form logic UX is still improving.
License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 2/5 Hosted cloud option

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Formbricks is used as an alternative to

Typeform

Conversational forms and surveys.

See all alternatives →

Google Forms

Free forms attached to Google Sheets.

See all alternatives →
